citation: Madhavan 2003 J. Finance (Russell Reconstitution Effect); Cai-Houge 2008 JPM (Russell Reconstitution OOS replication)

spec_decision.rule: KEEP if holdout_sharpe>=0.5 AND >=4/5 gates AND avg_holdout>0; CONDITIONAL if 3/5 AND avg_holdout>0; KILL otherwise

scaling_tier.rationale: Tier 1/2: requires /M2K integration, not in /MES-only $500 stack. Tier 3 ($25K-$100K) is where this becomes decision-critical: /M2K reconstitution is genuinely cross-asset (small-cap exposure separate from /MES SPX). Single-event/yr but well-documented Madhavan effect.

small_n_caveats: 1 reconstitution event/yr × 5y = 5 weeks × 5 sessions = 25 candidate sessions. After ATR/VIX filter, expect 20-25 actual trades.
Holdout (Y5) covers 1 reconstitution week = 5 trades — same N order as QEF holdout (12). Coin-flip Sharpe at this N.
PBO is degenerate with 1 combo (no in-sample selection). Operator must focus on MEAN P&L PER TRADE and holdout sign-match.
